"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.isEmpty = void 0; var lift_1 = require("../util/lift"); var OperatorSubscriber_1 = require("./OperatorSubscriber"); function isEmpty() { return lift_1.operate(function (source, subscriber) { source.subscribe(OperatorSubscriber_1.createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, function () { subscriber.next(false); subscriber.complete(); }, function () { subscriber.next(true); subscriber.complete(); })); }); } exports.isEmpty = isEmpty; //# sourceMappingURL=isEmpty.js.map
